calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Denied. Defendant debtor fails to establish that the funds are exempt.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Off Calendar
